title: alchemilla hoppeana subsp. visianii
intro: Alchemilla hoppeana subsp. visianii is a subspecies of the Aconitella genus, commonly known as the mountain lady's mantle. It is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Alps, used for its medicinal properties due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and as a diuretic, thanks to its ability to stimulate urine production and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla hoppeana subsp. visianii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other minor health issues.
